meta.title: Discover Your Character — Saga for Creators Vol. 1 | Isabella Lizarralde
meta.description: Discover who you are as a creator before you think about strategy. Define your voice, your real niche, and your ideal audience with a method rooted in your essence—not trends.

hero.headline: When you know who you are, you create from a real place. And what's real always connects.
hero.subhead: This ebook guides you to discover your essence, define your voice, and know exactly who you're talking to—before algorithms, trends, or strategy.
hero.cta: I want to find my identity
hero.ctaMicrocopy: Instant access · Secure payment · No subscription

problem.title: You post, you try hard, you follow trends. And still something doesn't fit.

cards.title: You post often, but nothing connects deeply
cards.body: You follow trends, show up consistently... and the numbers don't move. It's not the camera. Your profile still doesn't have a soul.

cards.title: You don't know what to post without copying others
cards.body: You scroll TikTok for other people's ideas because when you try to create from yourself, your mind goes blank. And that's more exhausting than any edit.

cards.title: Your profile looks generic even when you try
cards.body: You look at your feed and it could be anyone's: no through-line, nothing that makes you recognizable, no clear reason to follow you instead of someone else.

cards.title: You think you need something special to start
cards.body: Followers, a team, the right camera, the perfect moment... The truth is the only thing missing is knowing who you are. That you can build.

solution.title: By the end of this ebook, you'll know exactly who you are as a creator.

titleHighlight.before: By the end of this ebook, you'll know exactly

solution.giftHint: Includes bonuses so you can apply it starting today.

outcomes.title: Find your real niche with Ikigai
outcomes.body: The intersection of what you love, what you're good at, and what the world needs—so your niche comes from inside you, not from what's trending.

outcomes.title: Identify your creator archetype
outcomes.body: You'll discover which of the 6 archetypes defines you naturally and how to use it to stand out in your niche without copying anyone.

outcomes.title: Build your brand voice in 4 dimensions
outcomes.body: Tone, energy, vocabulary, and perspective—so anything you publish sounds unmistakably like you, not a generic trend.

outcomes.title: Sketch the exact portrait of your ideal audience
outcomes.body: You'll stop creating for "everyone" and start speaking to the person who needs you specifically—and they'll feel it.

solution.imageAlt: Isabella — method applied in real content

proof.headline: I started scared, with no followers and no team. Two days later I had my first paid collaboration.
proof.intro: I kept my creative dream in a drawer for years. Until one day I took photos with what I had at home, put together a basic portfolio, and sent it with no expectations. Two days later, my first collaboration. Today, more than two years and 100+ brands later, I turned that path into the method in this ebook—so you can walk it with more clarity than I had.

bullets: First photos with what I had at home
Basic portfolio sent with no expectations
Learned what connects and what doesn't
Started to understand my real archetype
The method I wish I'd had

hero.statement: It's not just an ebook. It's the full map of your identity as a creator—with the resources to apply it starting today.

lineItems.label: Bank of 30–50 content ideas from your essence
Moodboard guide for your visual identity
Minimum consistency system — the routine that sticks

bonuses.outcomeBenefit: Weekly template so every piece has a goal, tone, and place on your calendar.

bonuses.imageAlt: Bonus: idea bank from your essence
bonuses.painHeadline: You go blank in front of the camera
bonuses.outcomeBenefit: 30–50 concrete ideas aligned with your niche so you never depend on someone else's scroll or the mood of the moment again.

bonuses.painHeadline: Your feed doesn't reflect who you are
bonuses.outcomeBenefit: Step-by-step guide to build your visual reference: colors, type, and aesthetic that represent you before you say a single word.

bonuses.painHeadline: Your consistency depends on your mood
bonuses.outcomeBenefit: The minimum viable system to publish with focus even on days you don't feel like it—without burning out or falling into the start-and-stop cycle.

urgency.title: Every day you post without a clear identity is effort that doesn't build.
bullets: The real cost isn't the price of the ebook — it's another week posting without knowing who you are or who you're talking to, copying trends because when you try to create from yourself your mind goes blank.
Launch bonuses are available in this opening window. When the period ends, the price goes up and the bonuses are removed from the bundle.

faq.introBody: Before something holds you back, here are the most common doubts.

items.q: Do I need a lot of followers for this to work?
items.a: No. Identity is built before growth, not after. If you're just starting, this ebook saves you months of creating without direction. If you've been at it a while and something still feels off, it gives you the clarity you may have missed from the start.

items.q: Does this help if I've been creating content for months (or years)?
items.a: Especially for you. Many experienced creators post, have a community, but something doesn't fully connect. The reason is almost always undefined identity. This ebook gives you that clarity at any stage.

items.q: What if there are already lots of creators doing the same thing as me?
items.a: No one has your story, your perspective, and your way of explaining things. Competition isn't a sign of saturation—it's a sign there's a market. The difference is you. This ebook helps you find and communicate exactly that.
It's a PDF designed to read and work through. It has 11 chapters with practical exercises at the end of each—so you don't just read, you build your identity as you go.

items.q: Where do I buy and how do I get access?
items.a: Checkout is processed on the external platform configured for this launch. After payment you'll get access instructions directly from there.

Refund policy applies per the payment platform—you can review it before buying at checkout. What I can promise is that the content is the same system I used: not theory, but the real path, distilled for you.

close.headline: You're the creator someone is waiting to find. The only step left is to start.
close.body: Identity doesn't arrive while you wait. It arrives by doing. This ebook is the first step to create from a real place, with clarity and intention—not from copying or fear.
close.footnote: Imperfect action always beats endless preparation.

transitions.problemToSolution: What if you don't have to keep creating without direction?
transitions.proofToOffer: That same journey — now distilled into a system for you.

exitIntent.headline: Wait — before you go.
exitIntent.body: You've been creating for a while without knowing exactly who you are as a creator. This ebook is the map you're missing. Once you have it, everything else makes more sense.
